name: Huddleston, Leslie
motto: "He shall to humanity a message bear!"
description: His leisure hours were spent on the track; And with the girls he wasn't a flirt, Save one who by name was Black.

name: Ward, Essie
description: Don't think because she is so small That Essie failed to do her part. For in Science and Art she beats them all: And it was at "Aggie" College she got her start.

name: Sanders, Eula
description: Noted for her unswerving devotion to Science. Though she is very quiet and gentle, deep down in her heart there is a work she means to carry to the needy; for from duty Eula was never known to shirk.

name: Pearce, Joe
motto: "The leader of the band and toots his own horn."
description: Joe liked very much to talk, read, write, laugh, and spell; but the thing he liked best of all was a pretty little shell.

name: Floy, Austin
motto: "The maiden bold who loved a Scoundrel."
description: Beauty of face and figure are hers; But they are not the only good things. For at any hour of the day you may pass near, You will know her by the way she sings.

name: Webb, Carl
motto: "I have a passion for the name of May!"
description: He was our president, brave and true, And whatever he said we tried to do; For we knew we could depend upon him In everything, and especially to sing.

name: Conrad, Lewis
motto: "Strong of his hands and strong of his legs, but still of his tongue!"
description: A right jolly good fellow Is our Senior friend Conrad; And to defend our colors He would out-jump his comrades.

name: May, Fannie Lee
motto: "You look wise. Please correct the error."
description: You will love her as soon as you've met her; And if you'd like to see a pleasant smile, Just say the "Farmer" is waiting for her, And has been all the while.

name: Russ, Maylene
motto: "Only the class of '47 could hold her down!"
description: She chose her profession early in life, And thought teaching a pleasant thing Until a bachelor who needed a wife Told her that wasn't the tune for her to sing.

name: Mathews, Agnes
motto: "She tried hard to edit this department."
description: Although her hair is very red, Her temper is by no means bad; And teaching, too, she does not dread; But cares very much for a lad.

name: Mendenhall, Logan
motto: "In his duty prompt at every call."
description: He's one among the best, And failing in anything is not his art; For he never shunned a test, But came across boldly with his part.

name: Green, Ben
description: Ben is considered one of the best students in school. He is diligent and enthusiastic in all student activities.

name: Johnson, Mary
description: She is a leader in anything which will be for the good of the school, Yuma Society, and George.

name: Pearce, Garland
description: He has won a reputation as a declaimer of some note throughout the state. He is an enthusiastic student.

name: Black, Ora
description: We have recently discovered that Ora is one of the most capable students in school. Since then we have used her.

name: Goad, Myrtle
description: Myrtle expects to practice her Domestic Science and Arts.

name: Stavely, Floyd
description: He is a ladies' man, a big sport, and an enthusiastic Yuma.

name: Cornelius, Ruby
clubs: Delegate, Y. W. C. A. convention at Conway
description: Ruby is a good musician, and an excellent student. She is a true blue Garland.

name: Scantland, Elbert
description: Elbert takes delight in giving spreads, visiting the President's home, and entertaining the Seniors.

name: Jackson, Carrie
description: Carrie is secretary-treasurer of our class. She acquired her ability as secretary writing loving epistles called notes, and has treasured the admiration of the opposite sex from her earliest existence until the present time.

name: Yocum, Donald
description: Donald is a Garland and a Day Student of some note. His ambition is to grow a "pomp."

name: Williams, Blanche
description: She is always willing to do more than her part to further the interest of the school.

name: Ford, Clarence
description: Mr. Ford has been with us only a few months this year, but has been a member of our student body before. He is married—so hands off, girls.

name: Holland, Horace
description: Horace entered school last September and is a prominent member of our student body.

name: Hodge, Mattie
description: She loves the school, and the school in return appreciates her.

name: Cannon, Alonzo
description: He came to us from Russellville, and has made a splendid record since. He distinguished himself immediately after his arrival by assisting in the killing of a $200 Short Horn for beef.

name: Hamilton, Marvin
description: His chief occupations are walking the post and flirting with Edna. He performs these duties with remarkable certainty.

name: Oma, McKinley
description: Oma has a splendid voice, winning ways, and a pleasing disposition. She is one of the most popular girls in school.

name: George, Baker
description: George has always been a leader in the student activities.

name: Madison, Sturgis
description: He is a quiet, steady fellow who has very little to say to any one, and especially to those of the opposite sex. He is a favorite with the teachers, and is liked by all the students.

name: Carrie, Long
description: She made a noted speech when she suggested that we entertain the Seniors. Since then she has been considered very intelligent by the Seniors.

name: Veta, Roundtree
description: Veta believes in basketball. She is a good player, and never tires of pitching goals. Her ambition is to grow slender.

name: Freddie, Sanders
description: Freddie is an ardent admirer of soldier boys—one especially. She intends to join the Arkansas Red Cross as soon as possible. Who blames her?
